since_last: 42% of 86 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.17%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 42% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.26% · BTC +2.60% · Gold -0.41% · Nasdaq100 -0.17%. 42% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.17%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.17%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -2.38%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +11.51%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +11.51%, MU +4.42%, DELL +3.74%, NXPI +3.65%, ZBRA +3.61%. Laggards: SPCX -9.71%, AVAV -7.53%, GOOGL -5.44%, MDB -5.29%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -9.71% at $167.04
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -9.71% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
